chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-436 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 13-05-2025 None present for the petitioner. **** On 06.05.2025, the following order was passed: “This petition is listed for non-prosecution; however, none has appeared on behalf of the petitioner; no intimation is received. This petition is liable to be dismissed for non- prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, adjourned to 13.05.2025”. Today, no one appeared on behalf of the petitioner; no intimation is received so far, which reflects that the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
